parameters.query:
WITH risk_candidates AS (
  SELECT 
    o.id as opp_id,
    o.opp_title,
    o.agency,
    o.dept,
    o.gda_score,
    o.gda_label,
    o.estimated_value,
    o.response_deadline,
    o.stage,
    o.set_aside,
    o.naics_code,
    CASE WHEN cp.opp_id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END as has_capture_plan,
    CASE WHEN o.response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE <= 30 THEN true ELSE false END as deadline_imminent,
    CASE WHEN o.response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND o.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE <= 60 THEN true ELSE false END as deadline_near,
    CASE WHEN o.estimated_value >= 10000000 THEN true ELSE false END as high_value
  FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
  LEFT JOIN gda_capture_plans cp ON cp.opp_id = o.id
  WHERE o.gda_label IN ('PURSUE', 'EVALUATE')
),
dept_concentration AS (
  SELECT dept, 
    COUNT(*)::float / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')), 0) * 100 as pct
  FROM gda_opportunity_tracker 
  WHERE gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')
  GROUP BY dept
  HAVING COUNT(*)::float / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')), 0) * 100 > 40
)
SELECT 
  rc.*,
  dc.pct as dept_concentration_pct
FROM risk_candidates rc
LEFT JOIN dept_concentration dc ON dc.dept = rc.dept
ORDER BY rc.gda_score DESC
